$comment: Per-phase model preference for sdlc panels. Panel shape is enforced by each phase's min_panel: the v1 resolver dedupes to one model per vendor, so min_panel is the distinct-vendor floor; plus rules.exclude_author_vendor. On a lifecycle-adopted repo, min_panel governs only the v1 path — the lifecycle block supplies a distinct-model floor. This file expresses preference; resolve-panel reconciles it against live credentials. Model ids drift: re-check with your model-list tooling. Each prefer entry may optionally carry pi's ':<thinking>' suffix (off/minimal/low/medium/high/xhigh/max), e.g. 'openai/gpt-5:high', to set that model's reasoning level for the phase — see plan_review below for an example. Not validated against the level enum on purpose (see the schema description): some providers use trailing colons for other things, e.g. Bedrock version suffixes.
